name: Butterscotch Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, and butter in a saucepan.
2. Heat mixture until it reaches 230 degrees F.
3. Mix cream, milk, and cornstarch in a separate bowl.
4. Add the mixture to the hot syrup, stirring until smooth over lowered heat.
5. The sauce will thicken as it cools.
6. This is an old soda fountain recipe, so it will have an old-fashioned taste rather than a commercial one.
